name: Orthogonal cytokine-response panel
description: Measures whether the perturbation shifts an orthogonal inflammatory-output signature in the desired direction.
best_use: Best first validation assay for a strong efficacy candidate with good viability and translation support.

name: Pathway-state orthogonal readout
description: Checks whether the primary-screen effect is reproduced by an independent pathway-focused readout.
best_use: Best follow-up assay when the primary-screen result is promising but conflicts with QC or context consistency.

name: Cell-state and viability liability panel
description: Measures whether the apparent perturbation gain is dominated by broad stress or viability effects.
best_use: Best de-risking assay when a candidate looks active but may be dominated by liability.
